title: Rotary latch assembly with multiple striker engagements
abstract: A rotary latch assembly includes a latch release having a detent and a pawl that is rotatable relative to the latch release about a pivot axis. The pawl includes at least one catch for engaging the detent to releasably hold the pawl in a fixed orientation. At least two contact surfaces are offset from the pivot axis. At least one spring is mounted to the pawl. The pawl is rotatable relative to the latch release between a neutral orientation and at least one non-neutral orientation. The at least one spring accumulates a stored energy during rotation of the pawl toward the at least one non-neutral orientation in response to force applied to one of the at least two contact surfaces, and the spring releases the stored energy when force is removed from one of the at least two contact surfaces to rotate the pawl toward the neutral orientation.
claims: 1. A rotary latch assembly comprising: a latch release having a detent; a pawl that is rotatable relative to the latch release about a pivot axis, the pawl comprising three catches, wherein each catch is configured for individually engaging the detent to releasably hold the pawl in a fixed orientation; at least two contact surfaces offset from the pivot axis; and at least one spring mounted to the pawl; the pawl being rotatable relative to the latch release between a neutral orientation and at least two non-neutral orientations; the at least one spring accumulating a stored energy during rotation of the pawl toward the at least two non-neutral orientations in response to force applied to one of the at least two contact surfaces; the spring releasing the stored energy when force is removed from said one of the at least two contact surfaces to rotate the pawl toward the neutral orientation; wherein the pawl defines an axis of symmetry extending between a third catch of the three catches and a pivot center aligned with the pivot axis, such that the at least two contact surfaces are arranged symmetrically about the axis of symmetry and second and first catches of the three catches are also arranged symmetrically about the axis of symmetry; and wherein the at least one spring mounted to the pawl comprises a first torsion spring and a second torsion spring.
